lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮੁ ਜਿਤਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਆਗੰਜਤ ਪਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: aatam jitaa guramatee aaganjat paagaa |
lines.english: He conquers his soul, following the Guru's Teachings, and attains the Imperishable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸੋ ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਤਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh dhiaaeaa paarabraham so kal meh taagaa |
lines.english: He alone keeps up in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, who meditates on the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਮਜਨਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sangat niramalaa atthasatth majanaagaa |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he is immaculate, as if he has bathed at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis prabh miliaa aapanaa so purakh sabhaagaa |
lines.english: He alone is a man of good fortune, who has met with God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਏਵਡ ਭਾਗਾ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak tis balihaaranai jis evadd bhaagaa |17|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to such a one, whose destiny is so great! ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਪਿਰੁ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਤਾਂ ਧਨ ਬਾਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaan pir andar taan dhan baahar |
lines.english: When the Husband Lord is within the heart, then Maya, the bride, goes outside.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਪਿਰੁ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਤਾਂ ਧਨ ਮਾਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaan pir baahar taan dhan maahar |
lines.english: When one's Husband Lord is outside of oneself, then Maya, the bride, is supreme.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਬਹੁ ਫੇਰ ਫਿਰਾਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai bahu fer firaahar |
lines.english: Without the Name, one wanders all around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ਜਾਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sang dikhaaeaa jaahar |
lines.english: The True Guru shows us that the Lord is with us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਹਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak sache sach samaahar |1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak merges in the Truest of the True. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਹਰ ਸਭਿ ਕਰਦਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਆਹਰੁ ਇਕੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aahar sabh karadaa firai aahar ik na hoe |
lines.english: Making all sorts of efforts, they wander around; but they do not make even one effort.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਹੂ ਵਡਾ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਮਰਤਬਾ ॥
lines.translit: vaddee hoo vaddaa apaar teraa maratabaa |
lines.english: The greatest of the great, infinite is Your dignity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਤੁ ਆਹਰਿ ਜਗੁ ਉਧਰੈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jit aahar jag udharai viralaa boojhai koe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, how rare are those who understand the effort which saves the world. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਪਰੰਗ ਅਨੇਕ ਨ ਜਾਪਨੑਿ ਕਰਤਬਾ ॥
lines.translit: rang parang anek na jaapana karatabaa |
lines.english: Your colors and hues are so numerous; no one can know Your actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeea andar jeeo sabh kichh jaanalaa |
lines.english: You are the Soul within all souls; You alone know everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਵਸਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਘਰੁ ਭਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh terai vas teraa ghar bhalaa |
lines.english: Everything is under Your control; Your home is beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣੁ ਮਹਤਾ ਤੇਜੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਆਪਿ ਜਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: maan mahataa tej aapanaa aap jar |
lines.english: Your honor, majesty and glory are Yours alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਵਧਾਈ ਤੁਧੁ ਘਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: terai ghar aanand vadhaaee tudh ghar |
lines.english: Your home is filled with bliss, which resonates and resounds throughout Your home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਗੈ ਬਿਨਵਤਾ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak daasan daas tudh aagai binavataa |18|
lines.english: Nanak, the slave of Your slaves, prays to You alone. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਭਰਪੂਰੁ ਦਿਸੈ ਜਤ ਕਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sarab kalaa bharapoor disai jat kataa |
lines.english: You are overflowing with all powers; wherever we look, there You are.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰਾ ਹਮਰਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਹਮ ਕਿਸ ਹੂ ਕੇ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kabeeraa hamaraa ko nahee ham kis hoo ke naeh |
lines.english: Kabeer, no one is mine, and I belong to no one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਤੜੇ ਬਾਜਾਰ ਸੋਹਨਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਪਾਰੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: chhatarre baajaar sohan vich vapaaree |
lines.english: Your streets are covered with canopies; under them, the traders look beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਖਰੁ ਹਿਕੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਖਟੇ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vakhar hik apaar naanak khatte so dhanee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone is truly a banker, who buys the infinite commodity. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਇਹੁ ਰਚਨੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin ihu rachan rachaaeaa tis hee maeh samaeh |2|
lines.english: I am absorbed in the One, who created this creation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਲੋਚੈ ਉਨੑ ਮਿਲਣ ਕਉ ਕਿਉ ਵੰਞੈ ਘਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: man lochai una milan kau kiau vanyai ghitaa |
lines.english: My mind longs to meet Him; how can I ever find Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲਿਉ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਸੁਹਾਵੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਫਲ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: safaliau birakh suhaavarraa har safal amritaa |
lines.english: The Lord is the most beautiful fruit tree, bearing fruits of Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਨਾ ਚਿਹਨਾ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਓਹੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਜਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: varanaa chihanaa baaharaa ohu agam ajitaa |
lines.english: He has no color or form; He is inaccessible and unconquerable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੀ ਤੁਸਾੜੀਆ ਮੈ ਦਸਿਹੁ ਮਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa karee tusaarreea mai dasihu mitaa |
lines.english: I shall serve you forever, if you tell me of my Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜੀਅ ਕਾ ਜੋ ਖੋਲੑੈ ਭਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: ohu piaaraa jeea kaa jo kholai bhitaa |
lines.english: I love Him with all my soul; He opens the door for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਨਿ ਸੰਤ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਲਾਇ ਚਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: dasan sant piaariaa sunahu laae chitaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Saints tell us, to listen with our consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਵੰਞਾ ਵਾਰਣੈ ਬਲੇ ਬਲਿ ਕਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: kurabaanee vanyaa vaaranai bale bal kitaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a dedicated, devoted sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਤਸਕਰ ਬੈਸਹਿ ਗਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer dharatee saadh kee tasakar baiseh gaeh |
lines.english: Kabeer, the earth belongs to the Holy, but the thieves have come and now sit among them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਉ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦਿਤਾ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: jis likhiaa naanak daas tis naau amrit satigur ditaa |19|
lines.english: One who has such pre-ordained destiny, O slave Nanak, is blessed with the Ambrosial Name by the True Guru. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤੀ ਭਾਰਿ ਨ ਬਿਆਪਈ ਉਨ ਕਉ ਲਾਹੂ ਲਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dharatee bhaar na biaapee un kau laahoo laeh |1|
lines.english: The earth does not feel their weight; even they profit. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਕੁਸੰਗੀ ਬੈਸਤੇ ਤਬ ਪੂਛੇ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sang kusangee baisate tab poochhe dharam raae |2|
lines.english: When one sits in the company of evil people, then he will be called to account by the Righteous Judge of Dharma. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਚਾਵਲ ਕਾਰਣੇ ਤੁਖ ਕਉ ਮੁਹਲੀ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer chaaval kaarane tukh kau muhalee laae |
lines.english: Kabeer, for the sake of the rice, the husks are beaten and threshed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਵਡ ਪਰਵਾਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਇਕਾਤੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee vadd paravaar aap ikaateea |
lines.english: He Himself has the greatest family; He Himself is all alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਜਾਤੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapanee keemat aap aape hee jaateea |
lines.english: He alone knows His own worth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਉਪੰਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap aap upaniaa |
lines.english: He Himself, by Himself, created everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਥਾਨੁ ਜਿਥੈ ਤੂ ਵੁਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su teraa thaan jithai too vutthaa |
lines.english: Blessed is Your place, where You dwell, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਵਰੰਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa keetaa aap aap varaniaa |
lines.english: Only He Himself can describe His own creation.
